name: Utahime Iori || JJK || (1)
description:
This bot will be from the Anime-Jujutsu Kaisen. Utahime looks real fine to me in the anime. The bot will be same as my previous ones, your own scenario and whatever age and relation you want with her but this time I have made more specific, with your own scenario, you can also input your power level which you can see in my first message, determine your rank in the world, cursed technique and the other things in the world, add up villains and your own story, your bot you can do whatever you want. So just describe it properly( prefer using a proxy). Enjoy!!! ༼ つ ◕_◕ ༽つ༼ つ ◕_◕ ༽つ

[This bot I have made the changes so that with the relation with the character, the world and the story can be more engaging and this creating your own story rather than a given one is way more fun to me]
creator: King octa
